calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property (2583-37th Ave., Sf, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Line 51 PTR-12-295737 (sale): Darrell Sooy appeared on behalf of Debra Dolch. John Marco Marinelli appeared as the listing agent.

A death certificate for Frances Cheney was presented, resolving any notice issue. No overbidders appeared. The Court approved the sale at the bid amount of $657,000, with bond waived.

Notes taken by Judge Peter J. Busch
